title: Dave Martis
summary: Martis is a Hot Wheels designer, modelmaker, and prototyper who worked with Mattel from 1999 to late 2004 as a senior project designer and model maker....

title: Hot Wheels: Turbo Racing
summary: Hot Wheels Turbo Racing is a racing video game released for the Nintendo 64 and PlayStation in 1999 published by Electronic Arts and developed by Stormfront Studios. It features 40 cars based on the Hot Wheels series of toys by Mattel. It also features Kyle Petty's 1999 NASCAR stock car, as it was sponsored by Hot Wheels.

title: List of 2026 Hot Wheels (by Series)
summary: For 2026, the Hot Wheels mainline is numbered 1 through 250 with color variations not receiving a new number. Treasure Hunts and store exclusives are numbered. For the listing by series see List of 2026 Hot Wheels.

title: Hot Wheels Stunt Track Driver 2: Get'n Dirty
summary: thumb|Box art for Stunt Track Driver 2. Stunt Track Driver 2: Get'n Dirty is a PC game developed by Mattel Media and published by THQ. It features a radical difference from the first Stunt Track Driver in the fact that the levels feature more terrain features than actual track.

title: Hot Wheels id (app)
summary: Hot Wheels id was a freemium mobile game developed by Mattel and released on the Apple App Store and Google Play Store in July 2019 as a companion app to the Hot Wheels id line.

title: Hot Wheels Legends Tour
summary: 200px|rightThe Hot Wheels Legends Tour is an annual custom car competition organized by Mattel since 2018 across the United States and globally, initially started to celebrate Hot Wheels's 50th anniversary. A calendar of scheduled events is released before the start of the competition, with global events introduced in 2020; US-based events have usually been held in conjunction with Wal-Mart....

title: Hot Wheels Infinite Rush
summary: Hot Wheels Infinite Rush is an upcoming 2026 racing game from the developers behind Hot Wheels Unleashed & Hot Wheels Unleashed 2: Turbocharged. Developed and published by Milestone S.r.l., the game is set to be released on 24 September 2026, for the Xbox Series X/S, PlayStation 5, Nintendo Switch 2 and Microsoft Windows.
